stemHtml: Which of the following statements about the MLS is correct?

options.a: It operates on one of 126 channels within an allocated frequency spread of 960 to 1215 MHz (UHF).
options.b: It operates in the VHF band and the frequency allocation is between 108.1 to 111.95 MHz.
options.c: It operates on one of 200 channels in the band 5.03 GHz to 5.09 GHz (SHF).
options.d: It operates on one of 40 channels in the band 329.15 to 335 MHz (UHF).
